title: Maximum Number of Pairs in Array

testcases.input: nums = [1,3,2,1,3,2,2] Output: [3,1] Explanation: Form a pair with nums[0] and nums[3] and remove them from nums. Now, nums = [3,2,3,2,2]. Form a pair with nums[0] and nums[2] and remove them from nums. Now, nums = [2,2,2]. Form a pair with nums[0] and nums[1] and remove them from nums. Now, nums = [2]. No more pairs can be formed. A total of 3 pairs have been formed, and there is 1 number leftover in nums.
testcases.expectedOutput: [3,1] Explanation: Form a pair with nums[0] and nums[3] and remove them from nums. Now, nums = [3,2,3,2,2]. Form a pair with nums[0] and nums[2] and remove them from nums. Now, nums = [2,2,2]. Form a pair with nums[0] and nums[1] and remove them from nums. Now, nums = [2]. No more pairs can be formed. A total of 3 pairs have been formed, and there is 1 number leftover in nums.

testcases.input: nums = [1,1] Output: [1,0] Explanation: Form a pair with nums[0] and nums[1] and remove them from nums. Now, nums = []. No more pairs can be formed. A total of 1 pair has been formed, and there are 0 numbers leftover in nums.
testcases.expectedOutput: [1,0] Explanation: Form a pair with nums[0] and nums[1] and remove them from nums. Now, nums = []. No more pairs can be formed. A total of 1 pair has been formed, and there are 0 numbers leftover in nums.

testcases.input: nums = [0] Output: [0,1] Explanation: No pairs can be formed, and there is 1 number leftover in nums.
testcases.expectedOutput: [0,1] Explanation: No pairs can be formed, and there is 1 number leftover in nums.
